allow: Bash(mkdir -p "e:/Silent Verse 2.0/scripts/client/network" && mv "e:/Silent Verse 2.0/scripts/client/network/enet_client.gd" /dev/null 2>/dev/null; ls "e:/Silent Verse 2.0/scripts/client/network/" 2>/dev/null || echo "already in scripts/client/")
Bash(sed -i 's/var equipped := player.get\("equipped", {}\)/var equipped: Dictionary = player.get\("equipped", {}\)/g' scripts/server/authority.gd)
Bash(sed -i 's/var now := Time.get_unix_time_from_system\(\)/var now: float = Time.get_unix_time_from_system\(\)/g' scripts/client/input_handler.gd)
Bash(sed -i 's/var mouse_delta := event.relative/var mouse_delta: Vector2 = event.relative/g' scripts/client/input_handler.gd)
Bash(sed -i 's/var pos_data := payload.get\("position", {}\)/var pos_data: Dictionary = payload.get\("position", {}\)/g' scripts/client/network/enet_client.gd)

Bash(sed -i 's/var pos := Vector3\(pos_data.get\("x", 0\), pos_data.get\("y", 0\), pos_data.get\("z", 0\)\)/var pos: Vector3 = Vector3\(pos_data.get\("x", 0\), pos_data.get\("y", 0\), pos_data.get\("z", 0\)\)/g' scripts/client/network/enet_client.gd)
Bash(sed -i 's/var decoded := NetworkPacket.decode\(json_str\)/var decoded: Dictionary = NetworkPacket.decode\(json_str\)/g' scripts/client/network/enet_client.gd)
Bash(sed -i 's/var json_str := packet.get_string_from_utf8\(\)/var json_str: String = packet.get_string_from_utf8\(\)/g' scripts/client/network/enet_client.gd)
Bash(git commit -m 'Phase 1 完成：物理引擎 + 网络层 + 联机验证 *)
Bash(git commit -m '玩法系统：世界生成 + 冶炼 + 锻造 + 自由建造 *)
